title: mitrasacme phascoides
intro: Mitrasacme phascoides, also known as the 'native violet' or 'native mitsacme', is a small, flowering plant native to Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and potentially lowering blood pressure. In herbal preparations, the leaves and flowers of Mitrasacme phascoides are often dried and used to make teas, tinctures, or infusions.
